variants: Gargi Sonawane was born in Willowfell Outskirts, where she developed an early fascination with paleontology. Today, she resides in Roseglade Station, drawn by its vibrant community of fossil enthusiasts. Gargi is a proud member of the Hardpan Fossil Hunters, an organization dedicated to exploring and preserving the earth's ancient history. Her expertise culminated in the creation of the Ironseed Stabilizer Guide, a comprehensive resource for fellow fossil hunters. For her contributions to the field, she received the Frostwillow Plaque, a prestigious honor acknowledging her remarkable achievements.
